verdict_rationale: No unauthenticated auth-bypass or unguarded in-flight data-loss was found; the global RBAC guard is fail-closed and 94/94 permission decorators are matrix-covered. But 1 blocking correctness bug and 55 important findings cluster around non-atomic writes, timezone drift, unbounded queries, audit-trail gaps and stubbed observability. The sole blocking item (COR-001) is masked on the current UTC prod host but corrupts snapshots on any non-UTC deploy.
